title: ufgetc
text: ufgetc Get additional data from a field displayed in a Uniface component. Explain this code short ufgetc (unsigned char* field, unsigned char* buffer, short max ); Copy Parameters field The name of the field. To resolve ambiguity, the name can be fully qualified, for example, field . entity . buffer (Output) The buffer that is to receive the field contents. max The size of the buffer pointed to by buffer . Ensure that this value is not larger than the actual size of the buffer. Return Values Table 1. Values returned by ufget and ufgetc Value Description >0 The number of bytes copied into the buffer Zero An error occurred <0 The negated number of bytes copied into the buffer. The negative status indicates that more data is available in the field and that you should call ufgetc to get that additional data. Use Library: yrtl Description ufgetc moves an additional chunk of data from a component field into the specified buffer. This function should be called only after an initial call to ufget or ufgetc returned a negative value, which indicates there is more data available. Parameters and return values are the same as for ufget , so if ufgetc also returns a negative status, it must be called repeatedly until a positive status is returned. See the description of ufget for additional information and example code. Example: ufget and ufgetc The following example illustrates how to use ufget , ufgetc , and ugetbind to read data from a specified (but arbitrary) field data into a buffer. Because the size of the field is unknown, the example reads fixed chunks and expands the buffer as necessary. The choice of 100 as the size of the fixed chunks is arbitrary. Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> #define CHUNKSIZE 100 EXPORT void getfield (char* fldname) { char bindname[80]; char* buf; int len; int totlen; ugetbind(fldname, bindname); /* Get bindname for efficiency */ buf = malloc(CHUNKSIZE); /* Allocate the buffer */ /* Get the first chunk of data */ len = ufget(bindname, buf, CHUNKSIZE); totlen = abs(len); /* Set total length */ while ( len < 0 ) /* More to come */ { /* Make room for next chunk */ buf = realloc(buf, totlen+CHUNKSIZE); /* Get next chunk */ len = ufgetc(bindname, buf+totlen, CHUNKSIZE); /* Update total length */ totlen += abs(len); } buf = realloc(buf, totlen+1); /* Make room for terminator */ buf[totlen] = 0; /* Add terminator */ } Copy Related Links ufget Get data from a field displayed in a Uniface component. ugetbind Get the internal bind name of a Uniface field.
